summary: PR-UM3 Usage Metering Testing Complete. All 17 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) report.generated increments when PDF export generated, (2) export.generated increments for CSV/ZIP/audit exports, (3) X-Correlation-Id dedupe mechanism works correctly, (4) dashboard/JSON reads do NOT count as report/export, (5) integration.call instrumentation exists on all Google Sheets provider paths.
passed_tests: ✅ test_integration_call_metric_defined - integration.call in UsageMetric and VALID_USAGE_METRICS
✅ test_source_event_id_uniqueness_enforced - unique index on (tenant_id, metric, source_event_id)
critical_code_review_comments: usage_service.py: track_report_generated(), track_export_generated(), track_integration_call() all properly use _track_usage_with_resolution() which enforces dedupe via source_event_id
report_output_service.py: generate_match_risk_executive_pdf() correctly calls track_report_generated() with source_event_id format {correlation_id}:match-risk-executive:{snapshot_date}
enterprise_export.py: /api/admin/tenant/export calls track_export_generated() with source_event_id format {correlation_id}:tenant-export:{org_id}
enterprise_audit.py: /api/admin/audit/export calls track_export_generated() BEFORE streaming (in generate_csv())
sheets_provider.py: All functions (read_sheet, append_rows, update_cells, get_sheet_metadata) accept metering_context and call _schedule_integration_call_metering() on real API calls
google_sheets_client.py: fetch_sheet_data, fetch_sheet_headers accept metering_context and call _schedule_integration_call_metering()
usage_ledger_repository.py: insert_event() catches DuplicateKeyError and returns None for idempotent metering
Sync services (hotel_portfolio_sync_service, sheet_sync_service, sheet_writeback_service) all pass metering_context to provider functions
seed_data_creation: No test data created - tests use unique X-Correlation-Id per run
context_for_next_testing_agent: PR-UM3 usage metering is complete. Key points: (1) report.generated tracked when real PDF output produced via report_output_service.py, (2) export.generated tracked for CSV/ZIP outputs in reports.py, enterprise_export.py, enterprise_audit.py, (3) integration.call instrumented on Google Sheets paths but will only count when GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON is configured and real API calls are made, (4) Dedupe via unique index on (tenant_id, metric, source_event_id) in usage_ledger collection, (5) Usage summary available at /api/admin/billing/tenants/{tenant_id}/usage

usage_metering_verification.dedupe_mechanism: Unique index on (tenant_id, metric, source_event_id) + DuplicateKeyError handling in insert_event()
usage_metering_verification.google_sheets_note: integration.call will only be metered when GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON is configured - currently NOT configured in this environment
